nasb.text: The Holy Spirit is signifying this, that the way into the holy place has not yet been disclosed while the outer tabernacle is still standing,

esv.text: By this the Holy Spirit indicates that the way into the holy places is not yet opened as long as the first section is still standing

cnv.text: 聖靈藉著這事表明，當第一進會幕存在的時候，進入至聖所的路，還沒有顯明出來。

ccb.text: 圣灵借此指明，只要头一个圣幕还在，进入至圣所的路就还没有开启。

csbs.text: 圣灵指明这一点：只要第一间会幕还存在，进入至圣所的道路就还没有显明出来。
